caption: The video captures a Russian military aircraft, identifiable by the "Россия" (Russia) text on its side, taxiing on a runway. The plane is a large, twin-engine jet with a sleek design and a distinctive nose shape. In the background, two helicopters are visible, parked on a grassy area near a red-and-white striped tower, possibly a navigation or communication tower. The scene suggests a military airfield, with the aircraft preparing for takeoff or having just landed. The overcast sky adds to the somber and official atmosphere of the setting. The presence of the helicopters and the tower indicates a well-equipped and operational military base.
